entry.ptxt: Indicates the vehicle speed receiving a signal from the skid Control ECU. (CAN (CAN No. 1 Bus))
Indicates the engine speed based on a signal received from the ECM. (CAN (CAN No. 1 Bus))
Indicates the engine coolant temperature based on a signal received from the ECM. (CAN (CAN No. 1 Bus))
Indicates the fuel level based on a signal the fuel sender gauge. (Direct Line)
Receives a turn signal from the turn signal flasher. (Direct Line)
Receives a beam signal from the main body ECU. (CAN (CAN No. 1 Bus))
Receives a charge light signal from the alternator L terminal. (Direct Line)
Receives a check engine light signal from the ECM. (Direct Line)
Open door indicator light comes on receiving a door condition signal from the main body ECU. (CAN (CAN MS Bus))
Receives a driver side seat belt signal from the center airbag sensor assembly. (CAN (CAN No. 1 Bus))

Receives a passenger side seat belt signal from the center airbag sensor assembly via the main body ECU (CAN) and transmits a passenger side seat belt condition signal to the clock assembly. (Direct Line)
Receives a HEAD indicator light signal from main body ECU. (CAN (CAN No. 1 Bus))
Receives a TAIL indicator light signal from the main body ECU. (CAN (CAN No. 1 Bus))
Receives an A/T shift condition and A/T gear position signal from the park/neutral position switch and the ECM. (CAN (CAN No. 1 Bus))
Receives a fuel signal from the fuel sender gauge. (Direct Line)
Receives an ABS signal from the skid Control ECU. (CAN (CAN No. 1 Bus))
Receives a SLIP signal from the skid Control ECU. (CAN (CAN No. 1 Bus))
Receives a VSC signal from the skid Control ECU. (CAN (CAN No. 1 Bus))
Receives a brake signal from the brake fluid level warning switch (Direct Line) and the skid Control ECU and main body ECU. (CAN (CAN No. 1 Bus))
Receives a cruise signal from the ECM. (CAN (CAN No. 1 Bus))
Receives an airbag signal from the center airbag sensor assembly. (CAN (CAN No. 1 Bus))
Receives an oil pressure signal from the engine oil pressure switch. (Direct Line)
Receives a tire pressure signal from the tire pressure warning ECU. (Direct Line)
Receives a washer signal from the washer level warning switch. (Direct Line)
An oil change reminder light comes on/blinks to remind the driver to change the engine oil depending on the vehicle driving distance.

item.ptxt: The multi-information display has been located in the center of the combination meter assembly.
The display shows a message or animation for each of the functions described in the table below.

entry.ptxt: When a door (driver/passenger/rear left/rear right/back/hood) of the vehicle is opened or closed, this item displays a warning message and animation to inform the driver of the condition of the door.

item.ptxt: A maintenance required will display the warning message to remind the driver to change the engine oil depending on the vehicle driving distance.
Displays the mode while in the maintenance request reset mode.
This display switches between odometer, trip meter A, and trip meter B in accordance with the operation of the ODO/TRIP switch.
It is possible to reset the trip display to keep pressing the trip reset knob for 0.8 second or more.

entry.ptxt: Displays the outside temperature in accordance with the ambient temperature signal from the A/C control amplifier.

item.ptxt: Displays the value that has been calculated by the meter CPU, which is based on the driven distance and the fuel consumption volume after the ignition switch is on (IG).
The average fuel consumption exceeds 99.9 or more, the indication will be "99.9".

entry.ptxt: Displays the value that has been calculated by the meter CPU, which is based on the the fuel consumption volume, fuel level, and vehicle speed.
Displays the cruising distance after starting the engine.
Displays the average vehicle speed after starting the engine.
Illuminates or blinks the master warning light and displays a warning message for each type of system failure.
Displays the DTCs pertaining to the VSC function.

item.ptxt: The multi-information display shows "DIAG" when turn the ignition switch on (IG) (See page for Advics, for Bosch).
Diagnosis information can be displayed on the multi-information display after connecting a jumper wire between TC and CG of the DLC3 connector.
